rationale: Re-assert each per-index `forall|i|` ensures with a single explicit trigger so the disjoint trigger groups for post1 and post2 are forced into the proof context. Then prove pointwise `post1_self_.page_array@[i] =~= post2_self_.page_array@[i]` by case-splitting on `i == index` (where the 8 field-pinning ensures collapse both Pages to identical structs) versus `i != index` (where both pages equal `pre_self_.page_array@[i]`), and finally lift to `Seq`/view extensional equality with `=~=`.
